notes: Focused subset hand-derived from Asana's official OpenAPI 3.0 spec (asana_oas.yaml). Covers only the endpoints the adaptor calls: tasks (get/create/update), project tasks list (getTasks), workspace task search (searchTask) and task stories (createTaskStory). upsertTask is implemented client-side via searchTask + create/update. Task/Story schemas reflect the official TaskResponse/StoryResponse shapes, trimmed to core fields.
